title: Drag Workshop
description:
Behind every fierce strut is a first brave step. Our Drag Workshop at Dragonfly Lounge is your invitation to take it. Maybe you’ve dreamed of lashes that could start a breeze. Maybe you’ve practised a lip sync to your mirror at 2am. Maybe you’ve just wondered what it would feel like to turn the volume up on you. This is a warm, welcoming space to explore it all. No experience. No pressure. No judgement. Just creativity, confidence, and a little sparkle.

Location: Colchester

We're sorry! No dates are currently scheduled for this experience. Please contact us.

Tickets are on sale until 3 hours before the experience starts, but may sell out sooner, so don't miss out!

Add to your booking for £2.00, giving you the flexibility to reschedule up to 5 minutes before the experience starts.
address: Dragonfly Lounge, Unit 3, Foundation House, Long Wyre Street, Colchester CO1 1AZ

title: Kings & Thunder: Drag Stars!
description:
We’re taking over Dragonfly Lounge for a night of pure entertainment as our players step into the spotlight and transform into their drag alter egos.

Hosted by club captains Jay & Kay, this is your chance to see the Kings and Thunder like you’ve never seen them before - serving looks, attitude, and unapologetic performances as they compete to be crowned the ultimate drag superstar.

Meet the judges:

  • ✨ Ace Spectrum
  • ✨ Sara Khasm
  • ✨ Head Judge: Dion Slayé

Four contestants. Multiple rounds. Zero holding back.

What to expect:

  • 💥 Meet the Stars – personality, presence, and larger-than-life characters
  • 🎭 Talent Round – lip syncs, performances, and bold creativity
  • 🎯 Audience Challenge – where things get unpredictable (and you might get pulled in…)
  • 💃 Final Showdown – one last chance to own the stage

Expect a mix of drag styles, big energy, and a lot of laughs. This isn’t about perfection, it’s about commitment, confidence, and putting on a show.

Whether you’re backing your teammates or just here for the chaos, this is set to be one of the standout nights of the season.

🎟️ Limited tickets available – don’t miss out.
address: Dragonfly Lounge, Unit 3, Foundation House, Long Wyre Street, Colchester CO1 1AZ

title: Magic Dyke
description:

Details

THE SEXIEST STEAMIEST SHOW IN THE UK IS ON THE ROAD & HOTTER THAN EVER 🔥

Friday 15th May / Dragon Fly Lounge Essex /  7:00pm

Magic Dyke is an outrageously sexy, hot & wild night of X-rated drag king magic 🥵 We're giving Magic Mike a run for their money as we deliver a show PACKED with steamy dance routines, seductive vocals, (consensual) audience interaction, lap dances, masc 4 masc magic, tipping dollars & more... The only thing this show is lacking in is CLOTHES 💦

Our kings are here to give you permission to let loose and release your inner over-excited straight girl on a hen do, 6 shots of tequila deep with penis-shaped straws in hand and the SEXIEST man she's ever seen giving her the eyes… We know she's living inside all of you, and at Magic Dyke we're here to set those inner straight girls FREE. Woo like you've never woo'd before! You deserve a night of switching off & getting turned on 🔥

Hosted and curated by the HEART-THROB that is Jamie Fuxx, you know you’re in for an absolute treat. His charm, charisma, and seductive vocals are guaranteed to get you screaming your little Fuxx Cub hearts out & sliding off your seats…

We'll be joined by our gorgeous topless tipping boi who will be selling tips on the night for you to really show your appreciation to the kings. We'll also have our much-loved wristband system in place - pop on a free wristband to show the kings you'd like some attention whether that's a flirt, a lil lap dance or maybe even being taken up on stage 😉 If you'd rather sit back and watch the action from a distance you can leave the wristband off and our kings will know you'd like some space to enjoy the action. You can of course change your mind at any time!

Find us on Instagram for updates and announcements @magicdykelive

The Dragonfly Lounge
Long Wyre Street, Colchester, CO1 1AZ

title: Boozy Bottomless Drag Afternoon Tea
description:
Where the TEA is served piping hot! 🫖 🍰

Join us for our 'Dragonfly Lounge Boozy Bottomless Drag Afternoon Tea', featuring live performances from amazing drag artists!

This is an Afternoon Tea with a twist of course…We’ll be serving Sandwiches and Scones and a Sweet Treat, and you can enjoy selected bottomless cocktails for 90 minutes served in teapots!

This is a sweet treat you don’t want to miss! 🍨 🩷 🫖

From 3pm to 5pm

Doors open at 2pm, event starts at 3pm

**OVER 18s ONLY**

---

Ticket prices:

Afternoon Tea - Cocktails and Mocktails - £45 (+booking fee) for Afternoon Tea and 90 minutes of bottomless teapot cocktails.

Afternoon Tea - Soft and Hot Drinks - £38 (+booking fee) for Afternoon Tea, bottomless soft drinks and hot drinks.

Mini Drag Brunch - £17 (+booking fee) for Mini Drag Brunch which includes Olives, Tortilla Chips and Salsa, One glass of Prosecco, Mimosa, Soft or Hot Drink. Happy Hour is on during the event to keep you topped up!

Mini Drag Brunch tickets can be purchased on the door subject to availability.

Please note that this option is not bottomless however we will be running Happy Hour deals alongside the event.

Orders must be placed at least 48 hours before the event.

**OVER 18s ONLY**

---

Tickets are refundable up to 72 hours before the event date however booking fees are non-refundable, unless we cancel the event in which case all fees will be refunded. All bookings cancelled after midday on the Thursday before the event will be charged a fee of £10 to cover the cost of food orders.

---

If you have allergies or dietary requirements please ensure you tell us on the booking system. We cannot cater for specific requirements without adequate notice.

If you have any questions about this event, please drop us a message on Facebook or Instagram.

---

If you need to bring a companion or personal assistant to help make your visit accessible, just add a complimentary ticket to your order so we know they’ll be joining you. If they'd also like to enjoy our delicious afternoon tea, they'll just need to purchase the appropriate ticket.

title: Pint of Science
description:
Come along to hear about how local conservationists are protecting nature for future generations, and the challenges they face. From fish to fungi, you will hear about a variety of different forms conservation can take!

### Fungi: The Good, the Bad, and the Seriously Misunderstood

Hayleigh Pogmore

(Postgraduate researcher, University of Essex)

Fungi are the unsung heroes of our planet, playing key roles in sustainability, medicine, and aiding towards our goals of net-zero. But globally, there are large misconceptions surrounding them, leading people to fear fungus. In this Pint of Science talk, postgraduate researcher Hayleigh Pogmore will take you on a tour of the weird, wonderful, and world-shaping kingdom of fungi, showing why they deserve the same curiosity, research effort, and conservation attention as our most charismatic species.

### Beyond Breeding: How can zoos help threatened species?

Olivia Wall

(Conservation Educator, Colchester Zoological Society)

This talk will explore the role of a modern zoo in the conservation of threatened species with particular focus on the more surprising elements. From contributions to genetic research and prototyping technology to figuring out how to get bears back-scratching for science, zoos have much to offer conservation efforts beyond breeding programmes and donating money. Several research projects conducted at Colchester Zoological Society in collaboration with field conservation organisations will be examined, highlighting how animals at the zoo are helping to save their counterparts in the wild.

### A Brief Unnatural History of Rivers

Darren Tansley

(Wilder rivers & Protected species manager at Essex Wildlife Trust)

From Brook Lamprey to Beavers, source to sea, rivers are one of our most diverse habitats but they have never been more threatened. Using real life examples of his work on Essex Rivers, Darren Tansley asks the questions what did rivers used to look like, what have we done to alter them and how can we make them more resilient in the face of the looming biodiversity and climate crises?

### Oceans: Treasures of the Deep

Olivier Leger

(Artist)

Dive in with ocean wildlife artist Olivier Leger! Through intricately detailed paintings, Oli shares how art can bring together science, conservation, and the stories of people, places and ecosystems - offering a space to explore our connection with our blue planet.

###### Events at The Dragonfly Lounge

Unit 3, Foundation House, Long Wyre St, Colchester, CO1 1AZ

- Pints, Paws & Preservation(18 May 2026)

- Be the Scientist: Citizen Science in Action(19 May 2026)

- Jurassic Pints(20 May 2026)

title: Kids Half-Term Holiday Hullaballoo
description:
Kids Half Term Holiday Hullaballoo

Overview

  • Kids Karaoke and Dance Parties 12pm-3pm
  • Wednesday 27th May Karaoke Party

School’s out, the speakers are on, and Dragonfly Lounge is turning into a glitter powered party zone. Holiday Hullaballoos are all about letting kids take centre stage. Think karaoke anthems, dancefloor favourites, and a room full of unstoppable energy. Whether they’re belting out chart toppers, forming a pop group for the afternoon, or showing off their best dance moves, this is their moment to shine.

What’s in store🎤 Kids karaoke with all the favourite hits

  • 🕺 High energy dance parties with party lights
  • 🌈 Fun, safe, supervised environment
  • 🎉 Games, mini challenges and plenty of prizes
  • 🍹 Soft drinks and treats available

No pressure. Just pure fun, confidence building, and holiday memories in the making.

Bring them ready to sing.

Leave with them utterly exhausted...just the way parents like them!

All children must be accompanied by an adult.
